actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The dragon makes three Rend attacks.

actions.name: Rend
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +10, reach 10 ft. Hit: 13 (2d6 + 6) Slashing damage plus 3 (1d6) Fire damage.

actions.name: Fire Breath (Recharge 5–6)
actions.description: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 17, each creature in a 30-foot Cone. Failure: 56 (16d6) Fire damage. Success: Half damage.

tactical_info.preferred_range: Mixed - aerial superiority and melee combat
tactical_info.tactics: Uses superior flight speed for aerial dominance, targets groups with powerful breath weapon, then closes for triple claw attacks with extended reach.
